document.docTitle: Helichrysum forskahlii var. forskahlii Hilliard & B. L. Burtt var. forskahlii
document.masterDocTitle: Annotated checklist of the vascular plants of Mount Kenya, East Africa

mods:titleInfo.mods:title: Annotated checklist of the vascular plants of Mount Kenya, East Africa

subSubSection.paragraph:
Helichrysum forskahlii (J.F.Gmel.) Hilliard & B. L. Burtt var. forskahlii
—
Habitat: LMWF, LMDF, BZ, UMF, HZ, AZ; up to 4 000 m. Distribution: I.
Voucher: Sirimon Track, Alt. 3 351 m, 8 Jan. 2014, SAJIT 001619 (HIB).
References: Rehder et al. (1981), Young & Peacock (1985), Bussmann (1993), Bussmann & Beck (1995a), Beentje (2002), Adbi (2013), Agnew (2013).
